dialogs.openFileTitle: Choose audio, lyrics, or cover art

status.samePath: The destination matches the current source, so nothing was written.
status.downloadFallback: This source will be saved through a download fallback.

errors.missingPath: There is no playable audio resource.
errors.unsupportedFile: Only these audio formats are supported right now: {extensions}
errors.openFailed: Unable to open the audio resource.
errors.saveFailed: Unable to save the audio file.
errors.loadFailed: Unable to load the audio resource.
errors.missingAudioInSelection: Select at least one audio file. Lyrics and cover art are treated as supplemental files.
errors.mediaDecode: This runtime could not decode the current track.
errors.mediaSource: This source cannot be played here.

viewer.emptyPrompt: Click the cover or drop audio, lyrics, and cover art here
viewer.emptyHint: You can choose one audio file together with its .lrc / cover files.
viewer.lyricsPlainHint: These lyrics are not timed, so they stay static.
viewer.selectBundleHint: The app auto-discovers cover / folder / front artwork and matching or lyrics.lrc files beside the track.
